page.title: Yacht Charter Marbella: Accepted Payment Methods

data.meta_description: Learn which payment methods we accept for your Marbella yacht charter. Secure deposit, bank transfer, or card – book your boat from Puerto Banús today.
data.summary: This page explains the accepted payment methods for booking a yacht charter in Marbella, covering deposit, balance, and cancellation terms to help you reserve your boat from Puerto Banús with confidence.
key_facts: Deposit of 50% required to confirm any charter.
Balance due 7 days before departure (or on the day for last-minute bookings).
Bank transfer and credit/debit card accepted.
All payments include Spanish IVA (21%) – no hidden fees.
Cancellation policy: free cancellation up to 14 days before charter.
Within 14–7 days: 50% refund of deposit; within 7 days: no refund.
Payment is processed securely via our booking system.

faq.q: What deposit is required to book a yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: A 50% deposit is required to secure your chosen boat and date. This applies to all vessels in our fleet, from the Astondoa 40 (€749/2h) to the Mangusta 80 (€4,719 minimum 4h). The remaining balance is due 7 days before your charter.

faq.q: Can I pay the balance on the day of the charter?
faq.a: Yes, for last-minute bookings made within 7 days of departure, the full payment is taken at the time of booking. For all other reservations, the balance is due 7 days before your charter date.

faq.q: Which payment methods do you accept?
faq.a: We accept bank transfers and credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, and Maestro). All payments are processed securely through our booking system. We do not accept cash or American Express.

faq.q: Are there any hidden fees or surcharges?
faq.a: No. All prices quoted include the licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). What you see is what you pay – no booking fees, no service charges.

faq.q: What is your cancellation policy for yacht charters?
faq.a: You can cancel free of charge up to 14 days before your charter. Between 14 and 7 days, we refund 50% of your deposit. Cancellations within 7 days of departure are non-refundable. We recommend travel insurance for peace of mind.

faq.q: Can I split the payment between multiple cards?
faq.a: Yes, we can split the deposit or balance across up to two cards. Please let us know at the time of booking so we can arrange this. Bank transfer payments must be made in a single transaction.

faq.q: How do I receive an invoice for my yacht charter?
faq.a: A full VAT invoice is issued automatically after payment is received. You will receive it by email within 24 hours of booking. It includes the breakdown of charges, including IVA (21%).
Absolutely. All card payments are processed via a PCI-compliant gateway. We do not store your card details. Bank transfers are handled through standard secure banking channels.

data.body_html:
When you're ready to book a Marbella yacht charter, knowing the payment methods and terms upfront makes the process smooth and stress-free. We keep it simple: a clear deposit structure, secure payment options, and transparent pricing with no surprises. Whether you're reserving a Mangusta 80 from Puerto Banús or a Speedboat for a fast afternoon trip, here's exactly how payment works.

Deposit and balance – how it works

To confirm any booking, we require a 50% deposit. This applies to all boats in our fleet, from the Astondoa 40 (€749/2h) to the Mangusta 80 (€4,719 minimum 4h). The remaining 50% is due 7 days before your charter date. For last-minute bookings made within that week, the full amount is taken at the time of booking. This structure gives you flexibility while securing your preferred vessel and slot.

Accepted payment methods

We accept two payment methods: bank transfer and credit/debit card (Visa, Mastercard, Maestro). All card payments are processed through a secure, PCI-compliant gateway – we never store your card details. Bank transfers are handled via standard secure banking channels. We do not accept cash or American Express. If you need to split the payment across two cards, just let us know at booking and we'll arrange it.

What's included in the price – no hidden fees

Every charter price includes: a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no booking fees, service charges, or surcharges. The price you see is the price you pay. For example, a Tier A boat like the Azimut 39 costs €749 for 2 hours inclusive of everything. For Tier B boats like the Mangusta 80, the minimum 4-hour charter (€4,719) also includes a free jet ski.

Cancellation and refund policy

We offer a straightforward cancellation policy: free cancellation up to 14 days before your charter. Between 14 and 7 days, you receive a 50% refund of your deposit. Cancellations within 7 days of departure are non-refundable. We recommend purchasing travel insurance to cover unforeseen circumstances. To cancel, simply contact us via WhatsApp or email – we'll process the refund within 5 working days.

How to book and pay

Booking is easy. Browse our fleet on the Boat Rental Marbella site, choose your boat and date, and send us a WhatsApp or use the contact form. We'll confirm availability and send you a payment link or bank transfer details. Once the deposit is received, your charter is confirmed. You'll receive a full VAT invoice by email within 24 hours. For any questions, our team is available 7 days a week.

Why choose Boat Rental Marbella?

We operate directly from Puerto Banús, the heart of Marbella's luxury boating scene. Our fleet includes 18 boats ranging from the Dubhe (8m, 5 pax) for intimate trips to the Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) for grand celebrations. Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, and snacks – no hidden extras. With transparent pricing and secure payment, you can book with confidence. Explore popular destinations like Cala del Faro, Estepona, or Sotogrande without worrying about the fine print.

Frequently asked questions

What deposit is required to book a yacht charter in Marbella?

A 50% deposit is required to secure your chosen boat and date. This applies to all vessels in our fleet, from the Astondoa 40 (€749/2h) to the Mangusta 80 (€4,719 minimum 4h). The remaining balance is due 7 days before your charter.

Can I pay the balance on the day of the charter?

Yes, for last-minute bookings made within 7 days of departure, the full payment is taken at the time of booking. For all other reservations, the balance is due 7 days before your charter date.

Which payment methods do you accept?

We accept bank transfers and credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, and Maestro). All payments are processed securely through our booking system. We do not accept cash or American Express.

Are there any hidden fees or surcharges?

No. All prices quoted include the licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). What you see is what you pay – no booking fees, no service charges.

What is your cancellation policy for yacht charters?

You can cancel free of charge up to 14 days before your charter. Between 14 and 7 days, we refund 50% of your deposit. Cancellations within 7 days of departure are non-refundable. We recommend travel insurance for peace of mind.

Can I split the payment between multiple cards?

Yes, we can split the deposit or balance across up to two cards. Please let us know at the time of booking so we can arrange this. Bank transfer payments must be made in a single transaction.

How do I receive an invoice for my yacht charter?

A full VAT invoice is issued automatically after payment is received. You will receive it by email within 24 hours of booking. It includes the breakdown of charges, including IVA (21%).

Is my payment information secure?

Absolutely. All card payments are processed via a PCI-compliant gateway. We do not store your card details. Bank transfers are handled through standard secure banking channels.
